question: The line chart shows sales from 1924 to 2024. Which statement best describes the main difficulty in interpreting this chart?

options.A: The chart is so small that it is hard to read exact years and see detailed changes in the trend.
options.B: Sales clearly declined from 1970 to 1980 and then rose sharply afterward.
options.C: The chart shows large seasonal swings in sales every few years.
options.D: Sales remained almost perfectly flat for the entire period shown.

explanation: The data shows a decline from 1960 to 1970, then a rise. Small text size can make it difficult to identify which decade had the decline.
